name: baoyu-post-to-x-enhanced
tagline: One-click publish to X/Twitter via Chrome CDP with multi-strategy text insertion and auto image upload.
description: Posts text, images, videos, and long-form articles to X via real Chrome browser. Features three-tier text insertion (CDP insertText → execCommand → osascript), Unicode hashtag truncation (≤3), Smart Reset editor cleanup, beforeunload dialog handling, and optimized CDP timeouts for reliable automated publishing.
author: clawstore-labs
